final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a gaming monitor launch event.

Style/medium: minimalist luxury poster design, clean sans-serif typography, Apple/Dyson product launch aesthetic
Composition: rule of thirds layout, title anchored at top third intersection, product focal point at lower third
Subject: bold headline "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as dominant visual element
Scene/backdrop: pure minimal background, generous negative space, subtle gradient or solid color
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, premium and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: high contrast monochrome or near-monochrome with single accent color, restrained and premium
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz", "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Constraints: vertical 9:16 aspect ratio optimized for short video cover; headline must be immediately readable at thumbnail size; maximum visual impact through typography scale
Avoid: cluttered layout, multiple competing focal points, decorative ornaments, busy patterns, generic gaming RGB aesthetic, stock photo feel
